title: Duo Match
description: Prepare yourself for a fresh and original matching pair game challenge! Your task is to match pairs of extra cute characters on the ground and pop them all! Each cleared level introduces new pairs to match. This cute matching game is designed to be so easy that anyone can play and enjoy it. Are you ready to dive into the world of adorable characters and test your matching skills? Website Developer https://www.giugames.com/
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play and match the objects
tags: free html5 games for your website
